segments.speaker: 讲话人15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm really struggling in my biology class. The material just doesn't make sense to me. I'm not sure what to do. You know, my roommate is a biology major, and she's worked at the tutoring center for about a year. Really? That could be useful. I can put you in touch with her. And what about your other classes this semester? I don't have any issues in the other ones. I really like my archaeology class. The professor is actually leading a program in Egypt this summer. If only I had some extra money lying around.
